email_body:
Dear Veronique,

I am excited to apply for the Content Marketeer position at SHOPWEDO. As a junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media, and SEO, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

Currently at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build/maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra. I also run mirook.com, where I create video and photo content, manage social media (Instagram/Facebook), and apply structured data for AI search visibility. I am comfortable with Canva, video editing, and social media planning.

I am creative, structured, and fluent in Dutch (A2, actively learning) and English. I thrive on collaborating with colleagues to capture stories and produce engaging content. I would love to bring my energy and skills to QLS België.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Veronique,

I am writing to apply for the Content Marketeer position at SHOPWEDO. As a junior digital marketer with a strong foundation in content creation, social media management, and SEO, I am excited about the opportunity to showcase the vibrant work happening at QLS België.

In my current role at Episto, I own on-page SEO and content strategy for client websites, writing keyword-targeted blog posts and managing WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra. I also handle social media integration and performance tracking using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. On my own project, mirook.com, I create photo and video content for Instagram and Facebook, edit short videos, and maintain a consistent posting schedule. I have experience with Canva and am comfortable with video editing tools.

I am particularly drawn to this role because it combines content creation, social media, and storytelling—areas where I excel. I am creative and structured, and I enjoy collaborating with colleagues to capture authentic stories. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I am eager to learn new tools and formats, and I am not afraid to approach colleagues for a quick photo or video.

I would love to bring my enthusiasm and skills to your team. Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
• Content creation: writing, photo/video, social media (Instagram, Facebook) for mirook.com
• WordPress site building and content management (Elementor, Astra) at Episto
• Social media planning and integration for client sites
• SEO and analytics: keyword research, performance tracking with Google Analytics, SEMrush
• Creative and structured, fluent in English, learning Dutch (A2)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Content · Social Media · SEO
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media management, and SEO. At Episto, I write keyword-targeted blog content, manage WordPress sites, and track performance. On my own project (mirook.com), I create photo and video content for Instagram and Facebook, edit short videos, and maintain a consistent social media presence. Comfortable with Canva, video editing, and social media planning. Creative, structured, and quick to learn new tools. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building (Elementor, Astra)
- Social media: content creation (photo/video), social media planning, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube
- Video & design: short video editing, Canva, Adobe Creative Cloud (basic)
- SEO & analytics: on-page SEO, keyword research, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, Content & Social Media (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Create and publish photo and video content on Instagram and Facebook; edit short videos for social media
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and ran iterative SEO/GEO audits to improve search visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
